variants: Edson Babatunde graduated from Keenwater College, where he cultivated his passion for floristry and obtained his Underworld Florist Certification. He is dedicated to the preservation of nature and contributes his time to the Guardian Waves Initiative, engaging in numerous environmental projects. In his professional interactions, Edson frequently uses Vietnamese tones, enabling him to effectively connect with a broad range of clients. His creative talents have been displayed in the Coral Lantern Syndicate, where his work has received notable recognition in the floral community.
